subject: Cloud Computing
title: Negotiating with Cloud Providers
description: A quick, practical guide to Negotiating with Cloud Providers.

hook.text: Spending $1 million per year on cloud? You have leverage. Cloud providers will negotiate custom pricing.

buildup.text: Enterprise Discount Programs offer custom rates for large commitments. AWS, Azure, and Google all have them.

discovery.text: Leverage comes from credible alternatives. If you can run on multiple clouds, providers compete for your money.

twist.text: Negotiations favor the informed. Companies that understand their usage in detail get far better deals.

climax.text: The best negotiators save 30-50% off list price. But it requires commitment, data, and willingness to switch.

punchline.text: Cloud pricing is a starting point. Big spenders can negotiate.

quiz.question: What gives companies leverage in cloud pricing negotiations?
options: The ability to run on multiple clouds, making providers compete
Threatening to stop using the internet entirely
Being a small company with minimal cloud spending
